refnamediv.refpurpose: Compare two images in a single display matrix.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imshowpair(image1, image2) out = imshowpair(image1, image2, method) out = imshowpair(image1, image2, method, alpha)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a side-by-side, blended, false-color, or difference comparison. Supported methods include montage, blend, falsecolor, and diff.

refsection.title: Examples
